programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The program includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, where riders earn ranking points toward the season standings. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.title: Day 1 - Al Shaqab Cup 2026
programme.desc: The Al Shaqab Cup is a prestigious equestrian event held in Doha from 25 to 29 March 2026, bringing together elite international riders and top-level horses in high-caliber competition. Staged at the world-class Al Shaqab venue, the event showcases the sport’s excellence and international appeal through a program of top-class equestrian action.

programme.desc: The Football Association Challenge Cup, more commonly known as the FA Cup, is the oldest national football competition in the world dating back to the 1871-72 season. 736 clubs compete for the chance to lift one of English football's most famous trophies. All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: EN UCL Magazine 2025/26 | E33
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Manchester United are winless in their last four Premier League games against Nottingham Forest, having won eight in a row against them before this. Nottingham Forest won this exact fixture 3-2 last season – only once have they won consecutive away league games against Manchester United, doing so under Brian Clough in September 1990/April 1992.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Leeds are winless in all seven of their Premier League meetings with Brighton, both the most they’ve faced a side without ever winning and the most the Seagulls have faced a side without ever losing in the competition. Brighton have lost just one of their last 14 league games against Leeds, keeping 10 clean sheets and conceding just six goals in th

programme.title: Newcastle United vs West Ham United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Newcastle lost this exact fixture 2-0 last season but haven’t lost consecutive home league games against West Ham since February/October 1998. West Ham are looking to complete just their third Premier League double over Newcastle, after 1998-99 and 2018-19.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Real Betis - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 37
programme.desc: Barcelona have won 20 of their 25 LaLiga matches against Real Betis since the 2012/13 season ; only against Sevilla and Athletic Club have they achieved more victories in the competition in that time. Real Betis have picked up points in three of their last seven away LaLiga games against Barcelona, as many as in their previous 19 visits to the Cat

programme.title: Ghana vs Senegal - CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.

programme.title: Atlético De Madrid vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, their longest ever unbeaten run against the Galicians in the competition. At home, Atlético de Madrid have avoided defeat in their last 13 LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, having lost four of their previous five ; since 2014/15, they have only drawn more hom

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 36
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won only four of their last nine LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, having won seven of their previous 10 meetings in the competition. Real Oviedo have picked up points in five of their last 11 away LaLiga matches against Real Madrid, having lost 25 of their first 27 visits to the Bernabéu in the top flight.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Paris SG have scored 13 goals without conceding a single one in their last three matches against Brest in all competitions. Paris SG are on a 33-match unbeaten run against Brest in all competitions, the joint-longest unbeaten streak in their history against a single opponent.

programme.desc: This match will be the fifth meeting between Paris FC and Paris Saint-Germain in all competitions, with both sides having won one and drawn two of their previous four encounters. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last 26 Ligue 1 matches against newly promoted sides, with their last such defeat coming in January 2021 against Lorient.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Burnley - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Arsenal have lost just one of their 19 Premier League games against Burnley, going down 1-0 at home in December 2020. Burnley have never scored more than once in 19 Premier League meetings with Arsenal, the most one side has faced any other without netting twice in a match in the competition.

programme.desc: Bournemouth have lost 16 of their 17 Premier League games against Manchester City, though the exception was a 2-1 win in this exact fixture last season. Manchester City’s 94.1% win rate against Bournemouth is the highest of any side against another in Premier League history.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Chelsea have won 38 Premier League games against Tottenham. It’s the most they’ve beaten an opponent in the competition, while Spurs have only lost more against Manchester United. programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.desc: ATP 1000 Internazionali BNL d’Italia 2026 takes place at Rome’s Foro Italico from 6–17 May, on outdoor clay courts. A key stop in the clay-court swing, the Masters 1000 event features a 96-player singles draw, with €8,235,540 in prize money and 1,000 ranking points awarded to the champion.

programme.title: Qualifying - Moto 2 - Catalonia Round
programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demandin

programme.title: Sprint Race - MotoGP - Catalonia 2026
programme.desc: The MotoGP paddock arrives at Jerez for the Spanish Grand Prix, where MotoGP, Moto2 and Moto3 come together at one of the sport’s most iconic and atmospheric tracks. programme.title: Main Race - Moto 3 - Catalonia Round 2026
programme.desc: The Americas GP at Circuit of the Americas features Moto3, Moto2, and MotoGP across a full race weekend, including qualifying, the MotoGP Sprint, and the main races. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Manchester United are winless in their last four Premier League games against Nottingham Forest, having won eight in a row against them before this. Nottingham Forest won this exact fixture 3-2 last season – only once have they won consecutive away league games against Manchester United, doing so under Brian Clough in September 1990/April 1992.

programme.title: Everton vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Having lost five of their first seven Premier League games against Sunderland, Everton have since lost just four of their last 26. Sunderland have lost eight of their last 10 Premier League away games against Everton, going down 6-2 and 2-0 in their last two visits.

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) - Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: My World Cup : Andrea Pirlo
Denmark vs Tunisia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first encounter between Denmark and Tunisia at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was a friendly 20 years ago in Japan, prior to the 2002 tournament; Denmark won 2-1. Denmark are unbeaten against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup whilst Tunisia have never prevailed against European opposition at the tournament.

programme.title: England vs Iran - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between England and Iran. The Islamic Republic have never beaten European opposition at the FIFA World Cup. England have qualified for the FIFA World Cup for the 16th time. It’s their seventh appearance in a row, their longest streak in the competition.

programme.title: France vs Australia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: France came out victorious in their only previous FIFA World Cup encounter with Australia, winning 2-1 in their opening fixture of the 2018 edition. The match produced two penalties – both converted – and an own goal. Australia’s only victory against France came in the 2001 FIFA Confederations Cup – they won 1-0 in Daegu, South Korea, thanks to a C

programme.title: Morocco vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first encounter between Morocco and Croatia at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was in the Hassan II Trophy in December 1996, played in Casablanca. The game ended 2-2, producing three red cards. Croatia won 7-6 on penalties. Croatia have won their two FIFA World Cup games against African opposition by an aggregate of 6-0.

programme.title: Morocco vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first encounter between Morocco and Croatia at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was in the Hassan II Trophy in December 1996, played in Casablanca. The game ended 2-2, producing three red cards. Croatia won 7-6 on penalties. Croatia have won their two FIFA World Cup games against African opposition by an aggregate of 6-0.

programme.title: Germany vs Japan - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany and Japan are meeting for the first time at the FIFA World Cup. Germany are unbeaten in their two previous encounters with Japan, both friendly internationals in 2004 and 2006. All seven goals in their two previous encounters were scored in the second half. Germany have won the FIFA World Cup four times, the joint-most for a European natio

programme.title: Spain vs Costa Rica - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first encounter between Spain and Costa Rica at the FIFA World Cup. In their three meetings – all friendlies – Spain are unbeaten against the Central American side. Spain are facing Costa Rica for the fourth time since 2011. Their three previous head-to-heads have produced 12 goals, an average of four per game.

programme.title: Belgium vs Canada - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first encounter between Belgium and Canada at the FIFA World Cup. Their only previous meeting was a June 1989 friendly in Ottawa – Belgium won 2-0. No European team has qualified for as many FIFA World Cup tournaments as Belgium without ever winning it. This is their 14th appearance.

programme.title: Switzerland vs Cameroon - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first ever encounter between Switzerland and Cameroon. It’s also only the second time that Switzerland will face African opposition at the FIFA World Cup – they beat Togo 2-0 in the group stages of the 2006 tournament. Switzerland have qualified for their 12th FIFA World Cup, finishing top of their group ahead of UEFA European Champions

programme.title: Portugal vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Portugal and Ghana’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 2014 FIFA World Cup. Portugal won 2-1, with a Cristiano Ronaldo winning goal. Portugal have won only three of their last 14 World Cup matches, each of them coming in the group stage of the competition – their last victory in the knockout stage came in June 2006, when they p

programme.title: Brazil vs Serbia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil have won each of their two previous encounters with Serbia, including their group stage fixture at the last FIFA World Cup. The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

programme.title: Brazil vs Serbia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil have won each of their two previous encounters with Serbia, including their group stage fixture at the last FIFA World Cup. The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

programme.title: Wales vs Iran - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is just the second ever meeting between Wales and Iran, with the Red Dragons winning the other in April 1978 – Phil Dwyer scoring the only goal of the game. Wales have faced Asian opposition seven times in their history and have only conceded once in these games, keeping six clean sheets. Their most recent such game was a 6-0 win against China

programme.title: Qatar vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first meeting of any kind between Qatar and Senegal, while it’s also the first time Senegal are ever facing the host nation in a FIFA World Cup match. Senegal’s only previous meeting with AFC opposition at the FIFA World Cup came in the last tournament in Russia, with the Lions twice letting a lead slip in a 2-2 draw with Japan.

programme.title: England vs United States - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the third meeting between England and USA at the FIFA World Cup, with the United States winning 1-0 in 1950 before a 1-1 draw in 2010. In all competitions, England have won eight of their 11 meetings with USA. Their last defeat against them came in June 1993, winning four and drawing one of their meetings since then.

programme.title: Tunisia vs Australia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is just the third meeting between Tunisia and Australia in all competitions – Australia won 3-0 in a friendly in October 1997, before Tunisia won 2-0 at the 2005 Confederations Cup. Australia are facing African opposition at the FIFA World Cup for just the second time – they drew 1-1 with Ghana in 2010 in the other.

programme.title: Poland vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is Poland’s first meeting with Saudi Arabia since March 2006 in a friendly, with Poland winning 2-1 thanks to a brace from Lukasz Sosin. This is just Poland’s third FIFA World Cup game against an Asian nation, losing 2-0 to Korea Republic in 2002, and beating Japan 1-0 in 2018.

programme.title: France vs Denmark - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the fourth meeting between France and Denmark at the FIFA World Cup, all in the group stage of the competition. France have gone on to win the tournament on two of the previous occasions they’ve faced Denmark, with the other coming as reigning champions in 2002. Denmark have won their last two meetings with France in all competitions,

programme.title: Argentina vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in their last 10 meetings with Mexico in all competitions since a 1-0 loss in the 2004 Copa América. Mexico have lost all three of their FIFA World Cup games against Argentina, going down 6-3 in 1930, 2-1 in 2006 and 3-1 in 2010. Only Austria and Nigeria have faced an opponent more often in the competition while losing eve

programme.title: Belgium vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Belgium and Morocco at the FIFA World Cup, with Belgium winning 1-0 in the other in the 1994 edition. Morocco won their last meeting with Belgium in all competitions, winning 4-1 in a friendly back in March 2008. They had lost their two games against the Belgians before this.

programme.title: Spain vs Germany - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the fifth meeting between Spain and Germany at the FIFA World Cup, the joint-most that Spain have faced any side at the competition. They failed to win any of their first three against Germany but won the most recent encounter 1-0 in the 2010 semi-final en route to lifting the trophy. Germany have won just one of their last seven meet

programme.title: Brazil vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Both previous meetings between Brazil and Switzerland at the FIFA World Cup have ended in a draw. No side have Brazil faced more at the competition without ever winning than the Swiss. programme.title: Portugal vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the second FIFA World Cup meeting between Portugal and Uruguay, with the South Americans eliminating Portugal in the second round of the 2018 edition in Russia. programme.title: Netherlands vs Qatar - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: The Netherlands have won all four of their FIFA World Cup matches against Asian sides, scoring 11 goals and conceding just once. This is their first ever meeting with Qatar in any competition. programme.title: Netherlands vs Qatar - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: The Netherlands have won all four of their FIFA World Cup matches against Asian sides, scoring 11 goals and conceding just once. programme.title: Wales vs England - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: England have won each of their last six games against Wales, scoring 11 goals in that run and conceding only one, a Gareth Bale free-kick at EURO 2016. Wales’ last victory dates back to May 1984, courtesy of a Mark Hughes goal. This is England’s first ever FIFA World Cup match against a fellow British side. The Three Lions are unbeaten in all three

programme.title: Iran vs United States - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the first meeting between Iran and USA in any competition since January 2000, with the sides playing out a 1-1 draw in a friendly match in California. Iran beat USA 2-1 in the only previous meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup, with that victory eliminating the United States from the 1998 edition in France.

programme.title: Tunisia vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: France have never lost in four previous meetings with Tunisia, with this their first encounter since a 1-1 draw in May 2010. France have alternated between winning and losing in each of their five FIFA World Cup matches against African nations, beating Nigeria 2-0 in their last such match in 2014.

The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

programme.title: Wales vs Iran - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is just the second ever meeting between Wales and Iran, with the Red Dragons winning the other in April 1978 – Phil Dwyer scoring the only goal of the game. Wales have faced Asian opposition seven times in their history and have only conceded once in these games, keeping six clean sheets. Their most recent such game was a 6-0 win against China

programme.title: Qatar vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first meeting of any kind between Qatar and Senegal, while it’s also the first time Senegal are ever facing the host nation in a FIFA World Cup match. Senegal’s only previous meeting with AFC opposition at the FIFA World Cup came in the last tournament in Russia, with the Lions twice letting a lead slip in a 2-2 draw with Japan.

programme.title: England vs United States - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the third meeting between England and USA at the FIFA World Cup, with the United States winning 1-0 in 1950 before a 1-1 draw in 2010. In all competitions, England have won eight of their 11 meetings with USA. Their last defeat against them came in June 1993, winning four and drawing one of their meetings since then.

programme.title: Tunisia vs Australia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is just the third meeting between Tunisia and Australia in all competitions – Australia won 3-0 in a friendly in October 1997, before Tunisia won 2-0 at the 2005 Confederations Cup. Australia are facing African opposition at the FIFA World Cup for just the second time – they drew 1-1 with Ghana in 2010 in the other.

programme.title: Tunisia vs Australia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is just the third meeting between Tunisia and Australia in all competitions – Australia won 3-0 in a friendly in October 1997, before Tunisia won 2-0 at the 2005 Confederations Cup. Australia are facing African opposition at the FIFA World Cup for just the second time – they drew 1-1 with Ghana in 2010 in the other.

programme.title: Poland vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is Poland’s first meeting with Saudi Arabia since March 2006 in a friendly, with Poland winning 2-1 thanks to a brace from Lukasz Sosin. This is just Poland’s third FIFA World Cup game against an Asian nation, losing 2-0 to Korea Republic in 2002, and beating Japan 1-0 in 2018.

programme.title: France vs Denmark - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the fourth meeting between France and Denmark at the FIFA World Cup, all in the group stage of the competition. France have gone on to win the tournament on two of the previous occasions they’ve faced Denmark, with the other coming as reigning champions in 2002. Denmark have won their last two meetings with France in all competitions,

programme.title: Argentina vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in their last 10 meetings with Mexico in all competitions since a 1-0 loss in the 2004 Copa América. Mexico have lost all three of their FIFA World Cup games against Argentina, going down 6-3 in 1930, 2-1 in 2006 and 3-1 in 2010. Only Austria and Nigeria have faced an opponent more often in the competition while losing eve

programme.title: Belgium vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Belgium and Morocco at the FIFA World Cup, with Belgium winning 1-0 in the other in the 1994 edition. Morocco won their last meeting with Belgium in all competitions, winning 4-1 in a friendly back in March 2008. They had lost their two games against the Belgians before this.

programme.title: Spain vs Germany - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the fifth meeting between Spain and Germany at the FIFA World Cup, the joint-most that Spain have faced any side at the competition. They failed to win any of their first three against Germany but won the most recent encounter 1-0 in the 2010 semi-final en route to lifting the trophy. programme.desc: Both previous meetings between Brazil and Switzerland at the FIFA World Cup have ended in a draw. programme.title: Netherlands vs Qatar - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: The Netherlands have won all four of their FIFA World Cup matches against Asian sides, scoring 11 goals and conceding just once. This is their first ever meeting with Qatar in any competition. programme.title: Wales vs England - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage

programme.title: Elche vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 37
programme.desc: Elche have won two and lost three of their five home LaLiga matches against Getafe; only against Deportivo de La Coruña and Rayo Vallecano have they played more home games in the top-flight without a draw. Getafe are unbeaten in their last three LaLiga matches against Elche, recording as many victories in this period as they had in their previous

programme.title: Nantes vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Nantes have lost only two of their last 17 Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse, with those defeats coming in April 2019 and August 2023. With 23 points, Nantes are already assured to record their lowest points tally in a Ligue 1 season. Their previous lowest tally was 33 points in 2023-24, when they finished 14th.

programme.title: Deportivo vs Andorra - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Real Oviedo vs Deportivo Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 37
programme.desc: Real Oviedo have failed to win any of their last four LaLiga matches against Alavés, having won two of their first three top-flight meetings. Deportivo Alavés are winless in their last 11 matches against Real Oviedo in all competitions since a 1-0 victory in January 1980 in the Segunda División, a run that includes three LaLiga meetings.

programme.title: Lorient vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Lorient have lost just 14% of their Ligue 1 meetings with Le Havre, only having a lower defeat percentage against Le Mans and Ajaccio among teams they have faced at least five times. Lorient are unbeaten in their last nine home matches against Le Havre in all competitions, with their last defeat on home soil against them dating back to November 1

programme.title: Trabzonspor vs Genclerbirligi - Turkish Super League - MD 34 - 2025-2026
programme.desc: The Turkish Süper Lig is the top-flight competition of the Turkish football league system and is live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS. The season runs from August to May, with each club playing 38 matches. Matches are played Friday through to Monday. Galatasaray are the current Champions.

programme.title: Ligue 1 - MD34 Multiplex
programme.desc: Ligue1 Multiplex is a live carousel show featuring simultaneous coverage from every stadium, bringing you goals of 9 simultaneous matches , decisive moments and key updates as they happen in Last round of Ligue 1

programme.title: Brest vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Brest have won four of their last five Ligue 1 matches against Angers, having won only one of their first eight such meetings. programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
